Discuss the importance of charging infrastructure.
Mention government incentives or programs.
Consider the impact on the economy and job market.
task2.content: The government is conducting a survey to gauge public interest in the adoption of electric vehicles (EVs) in Canada. They want to know what factors influence residents' decisions to switch from gas-powered vehicles to electric ones. Your response should explore incentives, challenges, and benefits associated with EV ownership.

task2.title: 🚗 High-Speed Rail vs. Air Travel
tips: Compare travel times and costs for both options.
Discuss the environmental impact of rail vs. air travel.
Consider passenger comfort and convenience.
Provide insights based on current travel trends.
task2.content: Transport Canada is conducting a survey to evaluate the feasibility of introducing high-speed rail travel across major Canadian provinces as an alternative to air travel. They seek opinions on factors such as travel time, cost, and environmental impact. Your response should analyze the advantages and disadvantages of each transportation method.
